3242250.name: Jill O' Lantern: First Slice
3242250.description:
Enjoy this free slice of the bigger slasher pie!   

Game Features:

  • Play through the the first quarter of the game with limited choices in this demo, each with their own mock crime scene photo image.

  • Quick retry option on every "Bad End" to send you back and try again. No need to save at every choice.

  • Beautiful 2D sprites combined with expressive low poly 3D models for action sequences. 

  • Multiple point and click segments to investigate crime scenes and find clues.

  • Meet the cast and take a peek into the many mysteries on Lake Shish Kabob!

Full Game available October 15th!
3242250.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
